{{Missing Info}}

==Dawn Eye==

{{Organ Tabber
|Name=Dawn Eye
|Rarity=red
|ID Number=
|Initial HP=
|HP Increase=
|Initial ATK=
|ATK Increase=
|Initial DEF=
|DEF Increase=
|Initial RUSH=
|RUSH Increase=
|Effect 1=
|Initial Effect Value 1=
|Effect Value Increase 1=
|Effect 2=
|Initial Effect Value 2=
|Effect Value Increase 2=
|Effect 3=
|Initial Effect Value 3=
|Effect Value Increase 3=
|Effect 4=
|Initial Effect Value 4=
|Effect Value Increase 4=
|}}

==Source==
Obtain [[Aquarius]] (Supreme Relic)

[[Category:Organs]]
[[Category:Red Organs]]
